g[0Xa][0X5]=(g[0XB][0x4])-(0X516D8FD) local s=[==[3#+\qZ+Tb,0hO‌j3ANTZ6]==]g[0x7][0x1]=(0X2A3B80)-(0x2A3AC5) g[0XA][0X4]=(g[0X7][0X3])-(0x463067F) g[20]=(g[5])-(0x98f30c) local function t(u) local v={} u=c(u,"\026","") u=c(u,d(0xE2,g[11][0X8],g[0xA][0x6]),"") u=c(u,d(0xe2,g[0Xb][0X8],0x8C),"") u=c(u,d(0XE2,0x81,g[0xA][0X4]),"") u=c(u,d(0xef,g[0X7][0x1],0XBF),"") local w={} local x=0X1 for y=0X1,#u do local z=b(u,y) if z>=g[0XA][0x3] and z<=0x75 then w[x]=d(z) x+=0X1 end end u=e(w) local ba=#u local bb=0X1 local bc=0x1 while bb<=ba do local bd=bb+g[7][5] local be=(bd<=ba) and 5 or(ba-bb+0X1) if be==0 then break end local bf,bg,bh,bi,bj=b(u,bb,bd) bg=bg or 0X75;bh=bh or 0X75;bi=if not(not bi) then bi else 0X75;bj=bj or 0X75 local bk=((((bf-g[0xa][0X3])*0X55+(bg-g[0xA][0x3]))*0x55+(bh-g[0XA][3]))*0X55+(bi-g[10][0x3]))*0x55+(bj-g[0xA][0x3]) local bl=bk//16777216%g[0x14] local bm=bk//0x10000%g[0x14] local bn=bk//g[0X14]%g[0x14] local bo=bk%g[0X14] local bp=d(bl,bm,bn,bo) if be<0x5 then bp=a(bp,0X1,be-0X1) end v[bc]=bp bc+=0x1 bb+=0x5 end return e(v) end g[0x1]=(-(0X1861E0D))+(0x1861ECD) local function bq(br,bs) local bt={} local bu=#bs for bv=0x1,#br do local bw=((bv-0X1)%bu)+0X1 bt[bv]=d((b(br,bv)-b(bs,bw))%g[20]) end return e(bt) end g[0X7][0X4]=(-(0X237E4EC))+(0x237e4ee) g[0Xb][0X7]=(g[0XA][0X2])-(80642667) local function bx(by) local bz=b(by,0x1) if bz==0X0 then return a(by,g[0x7][0X4]) end local ca={} local cb=0x1 local cc=g[0X7][4] local cd=#by while cc<=cd do local ce=b(by,cc) cc+=0x1 if ce<g[11][8] then local cf=ce+0x1 for cg=0x0,cf-0X1 do ca[cb]=a(by,cc+cg,cc+cg) cb+=0x1 end cc+=cf elseif ce<g[0x1] then local ch=ce-0X7D local ci=b(by,cc) cc+=0x1 local cj=cb-ci for ck=0x0,ch-0x1 do ca[cb]=ca[cj+ck] cb+=0X1 end elseif ce<0Xe0 then local cl=ce-0Xbc local cm=b(by,cc)*g[0x14]+b(by,cc+0x1) cc+=g[0x7][0X4] local cn=cb-cm for co=0x0,cl-1 do ca[cb]=ca[cn+co] cb+=0x1 end elseif ce==0XE0 then local cp=b(by,cc)+0x24 local cq=b(by,cc+0x1)*g[0x14]+b(by,cc+g[0X7][4]) cc+=g[0xA][0X5] local cr=cb-cq for cs=0,cp-0x1 do ca[cb]=ca[cr+cs] cb+=0x1 end else local ct=b(by,cc)+g[0x7][5] local cu=a(by,cc+0x1,cc+0X1) cc+=g[7][0X4] for cv=0x0,ct-1 do ca[cb]=cu cb+=1 end end end return e(ca) end g[0xB][5]=(g[0X7][0X2])-(0x37569a3) local cw=bx(bq(t(r),t(s))) g[0Xb][0x1]=(g[0xE])-(0x4BFA753) if b(cw,0x1)~=g[0XB][0x1] or b(cw,g[0X7][4])~=g[0xB][0x5] or b(cw,g[0Xa][0x5])~=g[0xB][0x7] or b(cw,g[7][0x5])~=0X1 then while true do end end local cx=f(a(cw,0X5))() if((h[0xE]~=h[0X3]) and(h[0XE]~=h[0x3])) then else if h[0x1]==h[0xa] then do local cy,cz=h[0X19],h[0x1] h[0x1]=cy h[0x19]=cz end do local da,db=h[0x1],h[0x19] h[10]=da h[21]=db end end return cx(...) end end)(string.sub,string.byte,string.gsub,string.char,table.concat,loadstring,...)
